---
title: "Time Series Econometrics – Assignment 3"
subtitle: "Model Selection, Forecasting & Dickey-Fuller Testing"
author:
  - "Aadhitya Sankar Prasad"
  - "Johannes Felix Boppert"
  - "Keno Klebinger"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage{float}
---
